productDisplayName: Spykar Men Passion Navy Blue Shirt
description: Style NotePerfect for style and comfort, this shirt from spykar is sure to quickly elevate into a wardrobe favourite. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, it offers exemplary comfort. Team it with formal pants and leather shoes for a formal look, or with jeans and suede shoes for a semi-formal touch.Product DetailsNavy blue shirt with a stand collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm button tabs, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, embroidered branding above the right hem, stitched detailing, button tabs on the shoulder and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with warm water using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
